self.__next_f.push([1,"{\"intro\":\"Welcome to Hailuo AI. The “Subject Reference” function (the “Function”) is made available within Hailuo AI to help you get the most out of Hailuo AI’s content generation services (the “Services”) offered by Hailuo AI (“we” or “us”). Before using the Function, please read and fully understand this Important Notice regarding Subject Reference (the “Notice”). By clicking “confirm” or proceeding to use the Function, you agree to abide by this Notice as well as the Hailuo AI Terms of Service and all terms and conditions of the Hailuo AI services (collectively, the “Service Agreements”). Throughout your use of the Function, please continue to review and comply with the requirements of this Notice and the Service Agreements.\",\"content\":[{\"title\":\"- Your Input Content\",\"text\":\"You represent and warrant that all content you input, submit, upload, or publish (including, without limitation, text, images, audio, video, and all other forms of content, together with all textual, musical, audio, graphic, design, or other components contained therein) (collectively, your “Input Content”) while using the Function and the Services is either created by you, fully owned by you, or lawfully licensed to you under sufficient, lawful, and valid authorization. You represent and warrant that you and/or any third parties who have authorized the use of your Input Content in the Function and Services legally own the intellectual property rights, ownership rights, personal rights (including but not limited to rights of portrait or likeness), data rights, and/or other relevant rights in such Input Content, and that the Input Content does not infringe upon any third party’s intellectual property rights, personal rights, data rights, trade secrets, or other lawful rights. You assume sole responsibility for providing any Input Content through the Function and the Services.\"},{\"title\":\"- Portraits\",\"text\":\"If your Input Content includes a person’s facial features or likeness (collectively, “Portrait”), you must ensure that you have obtained sufficient, lawful, and valid authorization from the rights holder specifically for use in the Services and the Function. In the event that you have not obtained the requisite authorization or only obtained insufficient authorization or uninformed consent for any given Portrait, you shall refrain from incorporating such content into your use of the Services or the Function. Any breach of the foregoing shall render you solely liable for all resulting damages or consequences. We may detect and analyze feature points or vector points in any Portrait you provide in order to deliver the Services, but we will not use such information to identify any specific individual.\"},{\"title\":\"- Prohibited Uses\",\"text\":\" When using the Services and the Function, you must ensure all activities while using our Services and the Function, your Input Content, and any content generated or output by the Services (the “Output Content”) are for lawful purposes only. You must not use the Services, the Function, the Input Content, or the Output Content, in ways that violate applicable laws and regulations or infringe third-party rights. Prohibited conducts and/or purposes (“Prohibited Uses”) include but are not limited to:\",\"list\":[\"Misrepresenting or impersonating another person;\",\"Fabricating or spreading false information;\",\"Denigrating, disparaging, or otherwise undermining or damaging another person’s character and reputation;\",\"Insulting, defaming, or maliciously depicting others in false or negative light;\",\"Infringing upon a minors’ rights or harming a minor’s physical or mental health;\",\"Engaging in conduct that is harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, tortious, excessively violent, vulgar, obscene, pornographic, libelous, invasive of another's privacy, promoting or expressing racial hatred or any form of discrimination, or otherwise offensive;\",\"Engaging in any activity prohibited by the Service Agreements;\",\"Engaging in any other conduct that violates laws, regulations, or infringes upon lawful rights and interests of others.\"],\"end\":\"If you engage in any Prohibited Uses or misuse the Services, Input Content, or Output Content in violation of the Service Agreements, you bear sole responsibility for all resulting consequences and liabilities. If your actions cause harm to us, you shall compensate us for any resulting losses.\"},{\"title\":\"- Violations\",\"text\":\"If we find any of your Input Content or Output Content unlawful, violates this Notice, or breaches any Service Agreement, we reserve the right—at our sole discretion—to remove, block, or refuse to output the related content. We may also freeze, ban, or close your user account. If you become aware that any Input Content or Output Content is in violation of the foregoing, you must promptly take appropriate measures, including but not limited to deleting or replacing the content, to effectively prevent its generation or dissemination, and report the situation to us in a timely manner.\"},{\"title\":\"- Marking, Watermarks, and Disclaimers\",\"text\":\"You acknowledge, understand, and agree that, to comply with applicable laws and regulations and clarify ownership or usage restrictions for the Output Content, we may add labels or watermarks to it. We may also display prominent notifications (e.g., prompt messages) when you view, export, or download the Output Content, reminding you how to use it and what limitations apply. Unless otherwise agreed, you must not alter or remove any labels or watermarks we place on the Output Content. Additionally, whenever you use the Output Content, you must provide any necessary notices or statements indicating that the content was generated by AI to avoid confusion or misunderstanding. You are solely responsible for any consequences or liabilities resulting from failure to provide such notices or statements.\"},{\"title\":\"- Disclaimer of Warranties\",\"text\":\"Because the Output Content is generated from a technical model, and despite our efforts to refine our algorithms, technological limitations may prevent us from guaranteeing the applicability, accuracy, reliability, and completeness of the Services or Output Content. You acknowledge, understand, and agree that the Function is merely intended to assist you in using our content generation services and is provided to you in “as-is” condition. We make no warranty, nor do we assume any responsibility, regarding the quality, accuracy, reliability, or completeness of the Function, and you agree not to bring any related claims against us.\"},{\"title\":\"- Updates to Services and This Notice\",\"text\":\"We will continue to enhance our Services and the Function and will revise or update this Notice and the Service Agreements as appropriate. If any changes are made to the Function or this Notice, we will notify you through the Function’s interface or through other appropriate channel in our platform. If you do not agree to the changes, please discontinue use of the Function. Your continued use constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.\"},{\"title\":\"- Feedback and Intellectual Property Protection\",\"text\":\"We welcome any feedback or suggestions you have regarding our Services, as it helps us optimize and improve them. We take the protection of intellectual property rights, personal rights, and all other lawful rights very seriously. If you believe that the Services, or any user’s use of the Services, infringes upon your lawful rights, please contact us at feedback@hailuoai.com and provide valid proof of ownership rights and evidence of infringement. We will promptly investigate and, if necessary, remove or block the infringing content.\"}],\"end\":\"- Thank you for reading this Notice. By continuing to use the Function, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this Notice and the Service Agreements.\"}"])

self.__next_f.push([1,"We offer five membership plans: Standard, Pro, Master, Ultra and Max, along with pay-as-you-go credit purchases to meet different creative needs. Here is the number of credits included in each paid membership plan per month:
1. Standard Plan
 • Price: $14.99/month, limited-time offer at $7.99. The price will return to $14.99 after the promotion period.
 • Receive 1,000 credits per month, enough to generate around 40 6-second 768P videos/20 10-second 768P videos/12 6-second 1080P videos
 • Support for generating 6-second 1080P HD videos
 • Download watermark-free images and videos
 • Submit up to 5 tasks per session, processed sequentially (single-threaded)

2. Pro Plan
 • Price: $54.99/month, limited-time offer at $24.99. The price will return to $54.99 after the promotion period.
 • Receive 4,500 credits per month, enough to generate around 180 6-second 768P videos/90 10-second 768P videos/56 6-second 1080P videos
 • Support for generating 10-second 1080P HD videos
 • Download watermark-free images and videos
 • Submit up to 5 tasks per session, with up to 2 running in parallel to increase productivity

3. Master Plan
 • Price: $94.99/month, limited-time offer at $63.99. The price will return to $94.99 after the promotion period.
 • Receive 10,000 credits per month, enough to generate around 400 6-second 768P videos/200 10-second 768P videos/125 6-second 1080P videos
 • Support for generating 10-second 1080P HD videos
 • Download watermark-free images and videos
 • Submit up to 5 tasks per session, with 2 running in parallel to increase productivity

4. Ultra Plan
 • Price: $124.99/month
 • Receive 12,000 credits per month, which can be used with the Hailuo 02 model to generate around 480 6-second 768P videos/240 10-second 768P videos/150 6-second 1080P videos
 • Unlock unlimited access to the Hailuo 01 model (no credit consumption)
 • Support for generating 10-second 1080P HD videos
 • Submit up to 5 tasks per session, with 2 running in parallel to increase productivity

5. Max Plan (our most comprehensive plan)
 • Price: $199.99/month
 • Receive 20,000 credits per month, which can be used with the Hailuo 01/02 model and agent to generate around 900 6-second 768P videos/ 400 10-second 768P videos/250 6-second 1080P videos
 • Unlock unlimited access to the Hailuo 01 & 02 model (no credit consumption)
 • Support for generating 10-second 1080P HD videos
 • Submit up to 5 tasks per session, with 2 running in parallel to increase productivity


6. If you need more credits, you can purchase them at any time:
• Purchased credits expire after 1 year.
• Subscriber enjoys all the perks of the subscription. However, purchasing credits alone will not grant you the subscriber perks (such as fast track and watermarks removal).
• Limited-time offer of 43% additional credits for purchasing credits today. For example, if you purchase 350 credits, you will actually receive 350 + 350*43% = 500 credits. This offer is only applicable to direct credit purchases and does not apply to the membership plans above."])

MAX Membership First Discount + Up to 60% OFF\",\"3_biggest_sale_tips2\":\"Biggest Sale!! Enjoy Unlimited Generation!\",\"3_biggest_sale_tips3\":\"🔥🔥Biggest Sale!\",\"Account_deleted\":\"Account deleted\",\"Agent_price_slash_pop_cont\":\"Two major upgrades just landed:\\n✅ \u003cstrong\u003eSignificantly lower prices\u003c/strong\u003e — Creating Agent videos is now more affordable than ever.\\n✅ \u003cstrong\u003e2X the power\u003c/strong\u003e — You can now run two Agent video tasks at once for faster, more efficient workflows.\\nTry the new experience today!\",\"Agent_price_slash_pop_got\":\"Got it\",\"Agent_price_slash_pop_title\":\"Agent Template - Cheaper and Faster!\",\"Agent_price_slash_pop_try\":\"Try it now\",\"All_media\":\"All Creations\",\"B_roll_insert\":\"insert\",\"Detailed_view\":\"Detailed\",\"FAQ_10_A\":\"Great news! Your membership stacks with all new user perks. Enjoy both your bonus credits AND premium benefits like faster processing and commercial rights.\",\"FAQ_10_Q\":\"Will subscribing affect my new user bonuses?\",\"FAQ_11_A\":\"Users have **5** free opportunities to listen to sound preview audio per day. This opportunity is a shared quota across the **Sound Cloning and Sound Design** pages, and each listen on any page will consume this opportunity. Once the daily free listening opportunities are exhausted, generating more preview audio will consume sound debits according to the rules.\",\"FAQ_11_Q\":\"How are the number of audition previews for sound cloning and timbre design counted?\",\"FAQ_1_A\":\"You may cancel a recurring subscription at any time, but if you cancel before the end of a subscription period, we will not refund any subscription fees already paid to us.\",\"FAQ_1_Q\":\"What is your refund policy?\",\"FAQ_2_A\":\"The conversion between text and credits depends on the language you're using. In most cases, one English letter equals one credit, while one Chinese or Japanese character equals two credits. Check the specific conversion in the lower-left corner of the input box.\",\"FAQ_2_Q\":\"What is the conversion relationship between text and credits?\",\"FAQ_3_A\":\"For \u003cstrong\u003epersonal use\u003c/strong\u003e (like social media posts or non-profit presentations), you're welcome to use the audio freely - just remember to include our \u003cstrong\u003elogo\u003c/strong\u003e or \u003cstrong\u003ecredit\u003c/strong\u003e us as the source. For \u003cstrong\u003ecommercial use\u003c/strong\u003e (such as monetized content or business purposes), please subscribe to our \u003cstrong\u003estarter plan and above\u003c/strong\u003e.\",\"FAQ_3_Q\":\"Can I use the generated audio in my projects or post it on social media?\",\"FAQ_4_A\":\"The character limit is based on your \u003cstrong\u003eremaining credits\u003c/strong\u003e, which are converted to characters according to the model's pricing. If the converted value exceeds our model’s maximum limit (5000 characters for HD or 10000 characters for Turbo), the maximum limit will be displayed instead.\",\"FAQ_4_Q\":\"How much text can I convert to audio at once?\",\"FAQ_5_A\":\"We've set these limits (5,000 characters for HD and 10,000 for Turbo) to ensure the \u003cstrong\u003ebest model performance\u003c/strong\u003e. Need to convert longer texts? You can easily break them into smaller sections and process them separately. Turbo is 40% more cost-effective and supports longer texts, perfect for drafting or quick generation.\",\"FAQ_6_Q\":\"How do I choose between HD and Turbo models?\",\"FAQ_7_A\":\"When you upgrade from your current plan to the new one, your remaining credits from the current plan will be prorated, and you only need to pay the price difference upon upgrading.\",\"FAQ_7_Q\":\"If I upgrade a plan (e.g., from Creator to Standard), do I pay less?\",\"FAQ_8_A\":\"\u003cstrong\u003eNo.\u003c/strong\u003e Generations that fail to complete will not cost any credit.\",\"FAQ_8_Q\":\"Do I get charged if an audio generation fails?\",\"FAQ_9_A\":\"We offer a very flexible \u003cstrong\u003epay-as-you-go\u003c/strong\u003e Purchase Credits option, so that you don't need to choose between multiple subscription plans.\",\"FAQ_9_Q\":\"Do you offer any non-membership plans?\",\"FAQ_title\":\"Frequently Asked Questions\",\"First_3_mo_discount_enterence\":\"Subscribe Max for less\",\"First_3_mo_discount_month\":\"199.99/month after first 3 month\",\"First_3_mo_discount_quarter\":\"599.99/quarter after 1st quarter\",\"First_3_mo_discount_tag\":\"1st-time discount\",\"First_3_mo_discount_title\":\"First 3 months\",\"First_3_mo_discount_year_false\":\"2399.99 billed yearly\",\"First_3_mo_discount_year_ture\":\"2309.99 billed yearly\",\"H5_copy_message\":\"Link Copied\",\"H5_link\":\"https://www.minimax.io/audio\",\"H5_logo1\":\"MINIMAX\",\"H5_logo2\":\"Audio\",\"H5_redirect_message\":\"Open on Computer for Best Experience\",\"H5_subtitle\":\"Create lifelike audio in multiple languages, voices and emotions with MiniMax Audio.\",\"H5_view_tip\":\"Please access this page on a computer for the best experience.\",\"HD_model_duration_tip\":\"Estimated duration based on High-Fidelity model usage. Keep an eye on your notifications for a potential invitation!\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_10\":\"We freeze a portion of your earnings as a precautionary measure when a significant number of your referred users request refunds. The freeze structure works as follows:\\n\\n- Refund rate 20% to \u003c30%: We freeze your withdrawable earnings + 20% of pending earnings\\n- Refund rate 30% to \u003c50%: We freeze your withdrawable earnings + 50% of pending earnings\\n- Refund rate ≥50%: We freeze all withdrawable and pending earnings\\n\\nAfter a freeze is triggered, you enter a 30-day observation period. If your daily average refund rate remains below 10% during this period, we'll unfreeze 25% of your earnings every 7 days. If the refund rate exceeds 10%, the observation period timer resets.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_11\":\"Your withdrawable earnings may show a negative balance when refunds or chargebacks occur among your referred users. When this happens, we deduct the corresponding amounts from your commission. If your available withdrawable balance is insufficient to cover these deductions, your earnings will display as negative until future commissions offset the deficit.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_12\":\"Our affiliate program currently focuses on product sales only. We don't offer a multi-tier system, so you cannot earn commissions from sales made by other affiliates you might refer. However, stay tuned for potential program updates in the future!\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_13\":\"We prohibit spam, misleading advertisements, and any methods that violate our terms and conditions. Any promotional activities that could potentially damage HailuoAI's reputation are also strictly forbidden. We expect our affiliates to maintain ethical marketing practices at all times.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_14\":\"No, creating websites or social media profiles that could be confused with HailuoAI's official properties is strictly prohibited. Your promotional materials should clearly indicate that you are an affiliate partner, not an official representative of HailuoAI.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_15\":\"Violations of our promotional guidelines may result in the suspension or termination of your affiliate account. Additionally, we reserve the right to withhold any commissions earned through prohibited promotional methods. We take the integrity of our affiliate program seriously to maintain trust with our customers.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_2\":\"Individuals, bloggers, social media influencers, website owners, and businesses are welcome to apply if they meet these requirements:\\n - Comply with our platform's terms of service and promotion policies\\n - Do not promote illegal, infringing, or adult content\\n - Adhere to the laws and regulations of your country and the regions where you promote\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_3\":\"Your earning potential is unlimited! You'll receive 10% commission on the first-month subscription fees from any paying users you refer to our Standard, Pro, or Unlimited plans. The more you promote, the more you earn.\\n\\nExample: If you refer 10 Pro monthly subscribers and 20 Unlimited yearly subscribers, you'll earn:\\n(10×$34.99 + 20×$1139.88) × 95% × 10% = $2,199\\n\\n- $34.99 is the Pro Monthly Plan price, $1139.88 is the Unlimited Yearly Plan price\\n- 95% represents the actual amount paid by referred users after their 5% discount\\n- 10% is your commission rate\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_4\":\"Our commission structure is designed to benefit both affiliates and new customers:\\n- You receive a 10% commission on each subscription generated through your referral link\\n- New users who sign up through your link enjoy a 5% discount on their first order\\n- The commission is calculated based on the discounted amount paid by the referred customer\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_5\":\"You can track your earnings on the affiliate dashboard. Commissions become available for withdrawal 30 days after your referred customer makes a payment. For example, if someone purchases a subscription on March 1st, that commission will be recorded as pending and become withdrawable on April 1st.\\n\\nFor annual subscriptions, we distribute commissions in installments. You'll receive 1/12 of the total commission each month for the first 6 months, then the remaining 6/12 as a lump sum in the 7th month. For instance, if you earn a $120 commission from an annual subscription, you'll receive $10 monthly for the first six months, followed by $60 in the seventh month.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_6\":\"You can invite users who:\\n- Have not yet subscribed to any of our paid plans\\n- Have not already been referred by another affiliate\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_7\":\"The cookie from your referral link remains active for 7 days. This means if someone clicks your link and makes a purchase within that 7-day window, you'll earn the commission for the sale.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_8\":\"No, affiliate members cannot earn commission on their own purchases. The affiliate program is designed to reward you for bringing in new customers.\",\"affiliate_faq_answer_9\":\"If a customer you referred requests a refund, the associated commission will not be paid or will be deducted from your future earnings. If your referrals show a pattern of high refund rates, we may temporarily freeze a portion of your earnings until the refund rate normalizes. In cases of suspected fraudulent activity, we reserve the right to withhold payouts or clear earnings entirely.\",\"affiliate_faq_question_1\":\"How do I join the affiliate
